title: American Bitcoin ($ABTC) Activates 11,000 New Bitcoin Miners, Expanding Hashrate Capacity
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

American Bitcoin ($ABTC) Activates 11,000 New Bitcoin Miners, Expanding Hashrate Capacity

American Bitcoin (ABTC) announced it had energized more than 11,000 new mining machines at its Drumheller facility.

This post American Bitcoin ($ABTC) Activates 11,000 New Bitcoin Miners, Expanding Hashrate Capacity first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Strategy (MSTR) Surges 25% in 5 Days as Bitcoin Price Pumps Near $79,000
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Surges 25% in 5 Days as Bitcoin Price Pumps Near $79,000

Strategy posted over 25% in gains during the last five trading days, driven by a record-breaking Bitcoin acquisition and a surge in Bitcoin’s price near $79,000.

This post Strategy (MSTR) Surges 25% in 5 Days as Bitcoin Price Pumps Near $79,000 first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Russia Advances Sweeping Crypto Regulation Bill, Legalizes Cross-Border Payments and Tightens Market Controls
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Russia Advances Sweeping Crypto Regulation Bill, Legalizes Cross-Border Payments and Tightens Market Controls

Russia’s State Duma advanced a sweeping bill to regulate digital currencies, marking a major step toward formal oversight of the country’s crypto market.

This post Russia Advances Sweeping Crypto Regulation Bill, Legalizes Cross-Border Payments and Tightens Market Controls first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Kalshi and Polymarket Enter the Crypto Race to Launch Perpetual Futures
summary:

Kalshi and Polymarket Enter the Crypto Race to Launch Perpetual Futures

Kalshi and Polymarket are racing to launch crypto perpetual futures, signaling a shift from event-based betting to continuous derivatives trading.
